claims.text: The paper uses the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) for the autonomous docking application.
claims.source_quote: This paper presents a systematic approach for autonomous docking using the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV)

claims.text: The Stonefish simulator was adapted into a multiprocessing reinforcement learning framework to accelerate the learning process.
claims.source_quote: We adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework to significantly accelerate the learning process

claims.text: The multiprocessing RL framework incorporates realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.
claims.source_quote: incorporating realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise

claims.text: The Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm was used to develop the control policy.
claims.source_quote: Using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, we developed a 6-DoF control policy

claims.text: The control policy provides 6 degrees of freedom (6-DoF) control.
The policy was trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions.
claims.source_quote: trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions to ensure generalized performance

claims.text: The reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties.
claims.source_quote: Our reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties to facilitate soft docking

claims.text: The agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation.
claims.source_quote: the agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation

claims.text: The approach was successfully validated in a physical test tank.
claims.source_quote: successful validation in a physical test tank confirmed the efficacy of the sim-to-reality adaptation

claims.text: The DRL controller exhibited emergent pitch-based braking behavior during physical testing.
claims.source_quote: the DRL controller exhibiting emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment

claims.text: The DRL controller exhibited emergent yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment during physical testing.
claims.source_quote: the DRL controller exhibiting emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment

claims.text: A high-fidelity digital twin environment was used for the sim-to-reality adaptation approach.
claims.source_quote: by leveraging a high-fidelity digital twin environment

claims.text: Randomized starting positions were used to ensure generalized performance of the trained policy.
claims.source_quote: trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions to ensure generalized performance

claims.text: The reward structure was designed to facilitate soft docking.
claims.source_quote: adaptive collision penalties to facilitate soft docking

claims.text: Deep Reinforcement Learning offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking in adapting to unpredictable environmental conditions.
claims.source_quote: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking, particularly in adapting to unpredictable environmental conditions
